summary: The Goshen Township Zoning Commission held its regular meeting to approve prior meeting minutes, adopt the 2025 meeting schedule, elect officers for 2025, and consider the final development plan for Cove of Barkley Woods Section 2. The FDP for Section 2, consisting of 32 buildable lots on 10.85 acres, was approved with a condition requiring additional landscaping for buffering along lots 69 through 73.
decisions: Approved video meeting minutes from January 7, 2025
Adopted the 2025 Zoning Commission meeting schedule (first Tuesday of the month at 6:30 PM)
Elected Mr. Pegram as Zoning Commission Chairperson for 2025
Elected Lee Lewis as Zoning Commission Vice Chairperson for 2025
Elected Dave Curie as Zoning Commission Secretary for 2025

Approved Zoning Commission case 2022-003 Cove of Barkley Woods Section 2 FDP with condition requiring additional landscaping for near 100% buffer screening along lots 69-73 per Section 10.4 of the zoning resolution
action_items: Applicant (Kirstie Mormon / developer) to update the final development plan with additional landscaping along lots 69-73 to provide near 100% buffer screening and submit a planting list per Section 10.4
Staff (Alyssa) to distribute materials for the upcoming April 1st case to commission members as soon as possible
Continue search for alternate members for the Zoning Commission and BZA
key_amounts: Minimum side yard setback 5 feet (20 feet total between lots)
Minimum 1,400 square feet floor area for homes
Nearest home approximately 135 feet from lot 78
notable_topics: Election of Zoning Commission officers for 2025
Cove of Barkley Woods Section 2 Final Development Plan (ZC 2022-003)
Buffering and landscaping requirements for perimeter lots 69-73
PUD history including preliminary plan approval from 2018 and prior section approvals
Discussion of second access/egress point and emergency access history
Ongoing need for alternate members for Zoning Commission and BZA
attendees: Kirstie Mormon (Applicant, 8956 Glendale Milford Road, Suite 1, Loveland, OH 45140)
notes: Two commission members (Dinwiddie and Frisbee) were absent. The chair noted being 'used to getting an absence.' Ryan Homes is the current home builder for the development. A prior 2022 major adjustment request to reduce minimum home square footage was denied. Discussion about a potential second access point from Route 148 was resolved as never formally required. A new zoning case is expected for the April 1, 2025 meeting. The meeting adjourned at approximately 6:40-6:41 PM.
title: ZC 3-4-25
